positive: A celestial forest scene, rendered in a highly stylized, clean vector art style with deep contrast and limited, vivid color palette (sapphire blue, neon turquoise, and warm gold accents). The central composition features towering, bioluminescent flora and fauna that appear to float and intertwine, creating an ethereal, dreamy jungle canopy. Focus on strong, clean silhouettes and graphic depth. The style should mimic modern, intricate linework tattoo art meets cosmic mythology, optimized for seamless repetition on apparel. Overhead lighting suggests a perpetual twilight, giving everything a glowing edge. --ar 1:1 --v 6
negative: blurry, grainy, low detail, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, watermark, signature, text, logo, trademark, copyright, messy, photorealistic, oil painting
